title: Hydra (disambiguation)
content:
'''Hydra''' may refer to:

== [[Canon]] ==

* [[Battle hydra]]

== [[Star Wars Legends]] ==
*[[Hydra (Grand Inquisitor)|Hydra]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Inquisitor/Legends|Grand Inquisitor]].
**[[Hydra's blaster]] the weapon of Grand Inquisitor Hydra
**[[Hydra's cruiser]] the ship of Grand Inquisitor Hydra

*[[Hydra (Imperial I-class)|''Hydra'']], the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]].
*[[Hydra (escort carrier)|''Hydra'']], the [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|escort carrier]].
*[[Hydra (shapeshifter)|Hydra]], the female shapeshifter.
